name: Waldorf Salad Spread
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop half of the apple and slice the other half.
2. In a small bowl, blend the Neutreteille cheese and lemon juice.
3. Stir in the chopped apple, celery, walnuts, raisins, sugar, cinnamon, and nutmeg.
4. Add the low fat cottage cheese to the mixture and stir until combined.
5. Spoon the salad into a serving bowl.
6. Serve with apple slices, grapes, and crackers.
